allow: PowerShell($txt = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\("D:\\jp-invest\\web\\index.html", [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8\); $hasMojibake = $txt.Contains\([char]0x00E2\); $hasProperArrow = $txt.Contains\([char]0x25C0\); "Contains 'â' \(U+00E2 mojibake marker\): $hasMojibake"; "Contains '◀' \(U+25C0 proper arrow\): $hasProperArrow"; $i = $txt.IndexOf\([char]0x00E2\); if \($i -ge 0\) { $seg = $txt.Substring\($i, 8\); "First mojibake context codepoints:"; foreach \($c in $seg.ToCharArray\(\)\) { "  U+{0:X4} '{1}'" -f [int]$c, $c } })
